negative_memory.next_boundary: C0089 R0001 shows the tested session vwap dislocation reversion surface is not a candidate as implemented; remaining C0089 variants would be adjacent tuning, so next work should choose a new major C0090 hypothesis without selected, economics-pass, runtime, materialization, ONNX, promotion, or live claims
negative_memory.reason_not_candidate: activity landed inside the target band, but proxy, closed-bar MT5 logic, aggregate MT5 tick, and fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence did not establish a candidate

supporting_lessons.summary: R0001 produced 0 profitable and 9 losing fold-isolated MT5 tick folds, total tick net PnL -109.25, and worst fold rw_009 net PnL -24.49.
Schedule replay mechanical parity passed with mismatch_count 0, so the weak result is not explained by proxy-vs-MT5 logic mismatch.
Tick execution improved closed-bar logic by -5.58 total net PnL across 2 better and 7 worse folds, but both logic and tick surfaces remained negative.
Native MQL signal logic, ONNX materialization, cost/slippage hardening, final sizing, and historical lineage debt remain unresolved; no stronger claim is created.

required_kpi_summary.remaining_work_classification: no_candidate; further C0089 work would be adjacent threshold, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, or session-vwap-dislocation-reversion feature nudge tuning

hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: C0089 R0001 tests whether closed-M5 price dislocation away from the intraday session VWAP, followed by reversion or reclaim behavior, forms a portable entry surface. It changes anchor family, feature surface, label conditioning, model fit context, and trade-logic state key from C0088 prior-close magnet rejection. It is not a threshold/window/SL/TP/session/spread/capital nudge, materialization step, ONNX step, selected claim, runtime claim, or retry-only run.
